role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified as having no relevant linguistic evidence (no signs visible).
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Stayed within terrain, soil, and vegetation analysis.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on tree morphology (bark, foliage) and biome classification.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (unpaved, lack of signs) and correctly noted absence of regulatory markers.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed camera artifacts and dust trails, which fits the cross-domain/camera knowledge scope.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents stayed in their lanes, provided strong visual evidence (especially landscape and botanics), and the tournament correctly synthesized this into the right answer.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described red soil, dry grass, and eucalyptus trees.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described smooth bark and sclerophyllous leaves.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the dirt road and lack of infrastructure.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the dust cloud artifact.
